_comment: Toolbox image digests pinned per hal0 release. Phase 5 (update mechanism) replaces these placeholders with real cosign-signed digests. Until then images are pulled by :v1 tag. Schema: each toolbox is keyed by short name with 'image' (ghcr ref) and 'digest' (sha256:... or 'placeholder'). See PLAN.md §12 (toolbox images) and §17 (Risks: 'Toolbox images on ghcr.io/hal0-dev/ blocked by org provisioning').
